tests/test_bill_totals.py :: TestAssignmentAmounts
class TestAssignmentAmounts:
    def test_equal_split_rounds(self):
        amount = calculate_assignment_amount_owed(
            "equal", Decimal("0"), Decimal("10.00"), 3
        )
        assert amount == Decimal("3.33")

    def test_mixed_fixed_and_equal(self):
        assignments = [
            _assignment("fixed", "30.00"),
            _assignment("equal", "0"),
            _assignment("equal", "0"),
        ]
        recalculate_item_assignment_amounts(Decimal("100.00"), assignments)
        assert assignments[0].amount_owed == Decimal("30.00")
        assert assignments[1].amount_owed == Decimal("35.00")
        assert assignments[2].amount_owed == Decimal("35.00")

tests/test_bill_totals.py :: TestBillTotals
class TestBillTotals:
    def test_compute_bill_total(self):
        total = compute_bill_total(
            subtotal=Decimal("31.50"),
            tax=Decimal("2.52"),
            service_fee=Decimal("0.75"),
        )
        assert total == Decimal("34.77")

    def test_compute_service_fee_percentage(self):
        fee = compute_service_fee(
            subtotal=Decimal("100.00"),
            fee_type="percentage",
            fee_percentage=Decimal("3.5"),
            flat_amount=Decimal("0.75"),
            default_percentage=Decimal("3.5"),
        )
        assert fee == Decimal("3.50")

    def test_resolve_parsed_receipt_totals_uses_receipt_total(self):
        totals = resolve_parsed_receipt_totals(
            items_sum=Decimal("31.50"),
            tax=Decimal("2.52"),
            parsed_total=Decimal("34.02"),
        )
        assert totals.total == Decimal("34.02")
        assert totals.warnings == ()

    def test_resolve_parsed_receipt_totals_computes_missing_total(self):
        totals = resolve_parsed_receipt_totals(
            items_sum=Decimal("10.00"),
            tax=None,
            parsed_total=None,
        )
        assert totals.tax == Decimal("0")
  
... [truncated]

tests/test_bill_totals.py :: TestMemberShares
class TestMemberShares:
    def test_proportional_tax_share(self):
        add_ons = compute_member_add_ons(
            member_subtotal=Decimal("30.00"),
            bill_subtotal=Decimal("100.00"),
            bill_tax=Decimal("8.50"),
            bill_tip=Decimal("0.00"),
            bill_fee=Decimal("0.00"),
        )
        assert add_ons["tax_share"] == Decimal("2.55")

    def test_host_owes_nothing(self):
        owed = compute_member_total_owed(
            member_subtotal=Decimal("30.00"),
            tax_share=Decimal("2.55"),
            tip_share=Decimal("0.00"),
            fee_share=Decimal("0.00"),
            is_host=True,
        )
        assert owed == Decimal("0")

tests/test_bill_totals.py :: _assignment
def _assignment(share_type: str, share_value: str):
    assignment = type("Assignment", (), {})()
    assignment.share_type = share_type
    assignment.share_value = Decimal(share_value)
    assignment.amount_owed = Decimal("0")
    return assignment
